chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No. S–280 of 2021 Hearing of Case Mr. Safdar Ali Jogi, Advocate for the Petitioner. M/s Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G and Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State a/w Abdullah Lakher, DSP/SDPO, City Khairpur, Inspector Agha Shakeel, Ex-SHO, P.S, A-section, Khairpur, Inspector Muhammad Aslam Pathan, Legal Branch, SSP Office, Khairpur, ASI Abdul Shakoor, 15 Incharge, Khairpur and ASI Abdul Kareem, P.S, A- section, Khairpur. Date of Hearing: 30-12-2021 Date of Decision: 30-12-2021 O R D E R Zafar Ahmed Rajput, J. – Through instant Petition, the Petitioner Abdullah Khan son of Shaban Khan by caste Jatoi seeks protection against harassment allegedly being caused by the Respondents/police officials. 2. Today, comments are filed on behalf of the Respondents No. 2, 4 to 7 & 9. Perusal of the same shows that the Petitioner, his sons and brother-in-laws are involved in as many as 26-criminal cases of 3/4 Prohibition of Enforcement of Hudood Ordinance and 17/3 Enforcement of Hudood Ordinance etc. 3. Learned Additional P.G contends that the Petitioner as well as his family members are involved in number of cases registered against them at various police Stations and in fact police have never harassed the Petitioner or his family members, but it is the Petitioner who is harassing the police officials by filing false constitutional petitions for ulterior motives. 2 4. When learned Counsel for the Petitioner is confronted with the facts of alleged involvement of Petitioner and his family members in various cases, he has admitted that he has not mentioned this fact in this petition that number of criminal cases is registered against the Petitioner and his family members.

Learned Additional P.G contends that the Petitioner as well as his family members are involved in number of cases registered against them at various police Stations and in fact police have never harassed the Petitioner or his family members, but it is the Petitioner who is harassing the police officials by filing false constitutional petitions for ulterior motives. 2 4. When learned Counsel for the Petitioner is confronted with the facts of alleged involvement of Petitioner and his family members in various cases, he has admitted that he has not mentioned this fact in this petition that number of criminal cases is registered against the Petitioner and his family members. He, however, states that in many cases, the Petitioner and his family members have been acquitted by the competent Courts of law. 5. Perusal of record shows that alleged criminal cases have been registered against the Petitioner, his sons and brother-in-laws from 2010 to 2021 at various Police Stations; hence, there appears no enmity of the Petitioner with any police official nominated by him in this Petition for harassing him. Consequently, this Petition being devoid of any merit stands dismissed accordingly. J U D G E Ahmad
